# Scythe

> SQL-to-code generator that compiles annotated SQL into type-safe database access code in 10 languages across 10 databases with 70+ backend drivers. Built-in linting (93 rules) and formatting catch SQL bugs before they ship.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/getting-started/installation/): Install via cargo or Homebrew
- [Quickstart](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/getting-started/quickstart/): Zero to generated code in 5 minutes
- [Migration from sqlc](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/getting-started/migration-from-sqlc/): Convert sqlc projects to scythe

## Guide

- [Configuration](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/guide/configuration/): Full scythe.toml reference
- [Annotations](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/guide/annotations/): @name, @returns, @optional, @nullable, @json, and more
- [Type Inference](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/guide/type-inference/): How scythe infers types and nullability from SQL
- [Custom Types](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/guide/custom-types/): Type overrides for PostgreSQL extensions
- [Linting](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/guide/linting/): 22 built-in rules plus sqruff integration
- [Formatting](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/guide/formatting/): SQL formatting via sqruff
- [Pre-commit Hooks](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/guide/pre-commit-hooks/): prek/pre-commit hooks for SQL quality
- [CLI Reference](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/guide/cli-reference/): All commands, flags, exit codes
- [Migration from sqlfluff](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/guide/migration-from-sqlfluff/): Switch from sqlfluff to scythe

## Backends

- [Overview](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/backends/overview/): Architecture, type resolution, all 70+ backends
- [Rust (sqlx)](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/backends/rust-sqlx/): sqlx backend for Rust
- [Rust (tokio-postgres)](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/backends/rust-tokio-postgres/): tokio-postgres backend for Rust
- [Python](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/backends/python/): psycopg3, asyncpg, aiomysql, aiosqlite, duckdb backends
- [TypeScript](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/backends/typescript/): pg, postgres.js, mysql2, better-sqlite3, duckdb backends
- [Go](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/backends/go/): pgx and database/sql backends
- [Java / Kotlin](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/backends/java-kotlin/): JDBC, R2DBC, and Exposed backends
- [C#](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/backends/csharp/): Npgsql, MySqlConnector, Microsoft.Data.Sqlite backends
- [Other](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/backends/other/): Elixir, Ruby, PHP backends

## Databases

- [PostgreSQL](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/databases/postgresql/): PostgreSQL-specific types and features
- [MySQL](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/databases/mysql/): MySQL-specific types and features
- [SQLite](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/databases/sqlite/): SQLite-specific types and features
- [DuckDB](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/databases/duckdb/): DuckDB-specific types and features
- [CockroachDB](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/databases/cockroachdb/): CockroachDB-specific types and features
- [MSSQL](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/databases/mssql/): MSSQL-specific types, T-SQL dialect, and parameter syntax
- [Oracle](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/databases/oracle/): Oracle-specific types, PL/SQL dialect, and bind variables
- [MariaDB](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/databases/mariadb/): MariaDB-specific features (UUID, RETURNING, INET types)
- [Redshift](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/databases/redshift/): Redshift-specific types (SUPER, IDENTITY) and limitations
- [Snowflake](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/databases/snowflake/): Snowflake-specific types (VARIANT, TIMESTAMP variants, QUALIFY)

## Reference

- [Neutral Types](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/reference/neutral-types/): Complete type mapping table across all languages
- [Lint Rules](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/reference/lint-rules/): All 93 rules with codes and examples
- [Changelog](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/reference/changelog/): Release history

## Comparisons

- [Alternatives](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/comparisons/alternatives/): How scythe compares to sqlc, SQLDelight, jOOQ, and ORMs

## Optional

- [Philosophy](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/philosophy/): Why compile SQL instead of using an ORM
- [Architecture](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/architecture/): Internal architecture and crate structure
- [Examples](https://goldziher.github.io/scythe/examples/simple-crud/): Example projects
